title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Vijay Sales International Enterprises! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Vijay Sales International Enterprises:
Vijay Sales International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
